episodes.title: The Dramatic and Horrific Story of Cult Leader, Jeffrey Lundgren | Cult Justice
episodes.description:
After a nine-month investigation, authorities were horrified to find the bodies of a family of five, buried in a barn in the rural community of Kirtland, Ohio.

Documentary: Cult Justice | S1E05 | The Cult Tapes (The Jeffrey Lundgren story)

episodes.title: Jonestown: Paradise Lost | How the Worst Cult Massacre Ever Happened
episodes.description:
Jonestown: Paradise Lost

This dramatic documentary drama tracks the final build up to a horrific doomsday: the infamous mass murder and suicides of Jim Jones' cult followers in the jungles of Guyana, where over 900 men, women, and children died on November 18, 1978.

Documentary: Jonestown: Paradise Lost

episodes.title: How I Escaped The Children of God Cult | People Are Deep | True Crime Fix
episodes.description:
In this episode we talked to Petra Velzeboer, who grew up in a religious cult The Children Of God (now known as The Family International). Petra told us how she left the cult, how her trauma led to addiction and wanting to take her life, and how she managed to find healing and recovery.

Documentary: People Are Deep | S1E07 | How I Escaped A Dangerous Cult
**This film is under non-exclusive license from Hat Trick. All rights reserved.**
